name: statecrafting
description: Build harness for the @statecrafting packages (spec 002). Private and never published: it exists to cargo-build the vendored Encore core out of vendor/encore and link the results into the per-platform toolchain packages. The shipped artifacts are the packages under packages/.

scripts.build:runtime: ENCORE_VERSION=v1.57.9 cargo build --release --manifest-path vendor/encore/Cargo.toml -p encore-js-runtime -p encore-tsparser && node packages/toolchain/scripts/link-runtime.mjs
